November 1 to May 1 we are at the Stables. From May 2 to November 2 we are at: Oak Lawn Cemetery and Arboretum, 1530 Bronson Road, Fairfield, Connecticut 06824.
Directions; go in the front gate, then right, then go past a garage on your right. Then proceed onto Oak Lawn Rd. until you see the 911 Memorial on the right, next to the Butterfly Garden.
For further information, call Jill F; 203-395-0197. (In bad weather we meet at the Stables)
